letter.title: The story behind English.now
letter.subtitle: I depend on English Now every day too, and I'm obsessed with making it the best English learning app out there.
letter.paragraph1: I grew up in Ukraine where learning English felt like an impossible mountain to climb. Traditional classes were boring, textbooks were outdated, and apps felt more like games than real learning tools.
letter.highlight1: the best way to learn a language is by actually using it.
letter.paragraph2: Not by memorizing vocabulary lists or completing gamified lessons that give you points but don't prepare you for real-world conversations.
letter.paragraph3: English.now is my answer to everything that frustrated me about language learning. It's built on a simple belief:
letter.highlight2: AI can be that patient friend.
letter.paragraph4: It never judges your mistakes, it's available 24/7, and it adapts to exactly where you are in your learning journey.
letter.freeNote: , and I'm committed to keeping it that way.
letter.signOff: Thank you for using English Now.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for you.
pricing.pageTitle: Which plan is right for you?
pricing.pageSubtitle: All plans include access to our AI-powered learning tools.

faqSection.title: FAQs
faqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing and plans.

switchPlans.question: Can I switch between plans?
switchPlans.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll be charged the prorated difference. When downgrading, the new rate applies at your next billing cycle.

freeTrial.question: Is there a free trial for Pro?
freeTrial.answer: Absolutely! We offer a 7-day free trial for our Pro plan. No credit card required to start. You can explore all Pro features and decide if it's right for you.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and Apple Pay. For Team plans, we also offer invoice-based billing.

studentDiscounts.question: Do you offer student discounts?
studentDiscounts.answer: No, currently we don't offer student discounts. But we're working on it. Stay tuned!

cancelAnytime.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
cancelAnytime.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. No questions asked, no hidden fees.

progressSaved.question: Is my learning progress saved if I cancel?
progressSaved.answer: Your progress is always saved, even if you cancel or switch to the free plan. You can pick up where you left off whenever you decide to come back.

free.name: Free
features: First unit free + 1 lesson per day
10 vocab adds + 15 review cards per day

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Can't find the answer you are looking for?

howDoesItHelp.question: How does English Now help me learn English?
howDoesItHelp.answer: English Now is an all-in-one English learning app that combines conversation practice, vocabulary building, grammar lessons, and personalized feedback. Our AI-powered system adapts to your learning style and provides real-time corrections and suggestions to help you improve faster.

doINeedToPay.question: Do I need to pay to use English Now?
doINeedToPay.answer: We offer both free and premium plans. The free plan includes the first lesson unit, one new lesson per day, one AI conversation per day, one pronunciation session per day, and limited daily vocabulary practice. Our premium plan unlocks unlimited practice, full lesson access, detailed AI feedback, and personalized learning paths.

canIPracticeSpeaking.question: Can I practice speaking English with the app?
canIPracticeSpeaking.answer: Yes! English Now includes conversation practice features where you can have real-time conversations with our AI tutor. The AI will help you practice pronunciation, correct your mistakes, and guide you through natural conversations on various topics.

isProgressSaved.question: Is my progress saved across devices?
isProgressSaved.answer: Absolutely! Your progress, vocabulary, and learning history are automatically synced across all your devices when you sign in with your account. You can seamlessly continue learning on your phone, tablet, or computer.

howIsDifferent.question: How is this different from other English learning apps?
howIsDifferent.answer: English Now combines multiple learning methods in one app - conversation practice, vocabulary, grammar, and personalized feedback - all powered by advanced AI. Instead of switching between different apps, you get everything you need in one place, with a learning experience that adapts to your needs.

canIUseOffline.question: Can I use English Now offline?
canIUseOffline.answer: Some features are available offline, such as reviewing your saved vocabulary and completed lessons. However, conversation practice and AI feedback require an internet connection. We're working on expanding offline capabilities in future updates.
